title: Rolling Machine Setters, Operators, and Tenders, Metal and Plastic
description: Set up, operate, or tend machines to roll steel or plastic forming bends, beads, knurls, rolls, or plate, or to flatten, temper, or reduce gauge of material.

tasks.text: Monitor machine cycles and mill operation to detect jamming and to ensure that products conform to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Adjust and correct machine set-ups to reduce thicknesses, reshape products, and eliminate product defects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start operation of rolling and milling machines to flatten, temper, form, and reduce sheet metal sections and to produce steel strips.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine, inspect, and measure raw materials and finished products to verify conformance to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Read rolling orders, blueprints, and mill schedules to determine setup specifications, work sequences, product dimensions, and installation procedures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manipulate controls and observe dial indicators to monitor, adjust, and regulate speeds of machine mechanisms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Set distance points between rolls, guides, meters, and stops, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Calculate draft space and roll speed for each mill stand to plan rolling sequences and specified dimensions and tempers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Install equipment such as guides, guards, gears, cooling equipment, and rolls, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Position, align, and secure arbors, spindles, coils, mandrels, dies, and slitting knives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fill oil cups, adjust valves, and observe gauges to control flow of metal coolants and lubricants onto workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Activate shears and grinders to trim workpieces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal and assist other workers to remove and position equipment, fill hoppers, and feed materials into machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record mill production on schedule sheets.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Direct and train other workers to change rolls, operate mill equipment, remove coils and cobbles, and band and load material.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Thread or feed sheets or rods through rolling mechanisms, or start and control mechanisms that automatically feed steel into rollers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select rolls, dies, roll stands, and chucks from data charts to form specified contours and to fabricate products.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove scratches and polish roll surfaces, using polishing stones and electric buffers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble sizing mills removed from rolling lines, and sort and store parts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
